scores.reasoning: The prompt details specific visual elements such as a futuristic cityscape, enchanted forest, steampunk village, cyberpunk metropolis, haunted realm, floating islands, and ethereal light trails. The prompt is well-structured for image generation models, front-loading important elements, including style keywords, and using clear descriptors. prompt: Design an enthralling hero image for Luminth, an advanced AI world-building platform, emphasizing its genre-spanning capabilities. Utilize a 16:9 aspect ratio, ideal for a full-width website banner. Place the focal point off-center, adhering to the rule of thirds, with generous negative space on the left side for text overlay. Feature a stunning intersection of genre worlds, including a futuristic cityscape, an enchanted forest, a steampunk village, a cyberpunk metropolis, and a haunted realm, all seamlessly merging together. Introduce floating islands and ethereal light trails to guide the viewer’s gaze naturally. Employ a smooth gradient fade from right to left, enhancing text readability. Fully embrace Luminth's dark warm color palette—brown-black, teal, and gold—to create a unique fantasy-meets-technology aesthetic. Accentuate the atmosphere with an illuminated manuscript style, balancing vibrant yet harmonious colors. Layer depth to enhance immersion, crafting a natural visual journey from right to left through the varied genre worlds toward the text area.
